description.role: Undergraduate student at the University of Electro-Communications

about.title: About me
about.description: I am a fourth-year student in the Media Science and Engineering Program at the University of Electro-Communications in Japan. I am majoring in informatics. I began programming at the age of ten. I am interested in web development, particularly front-end development. I also enjoy working with various programming languages and frameworks.

articles.description: I write articles about my interests and experiences. (I am sorry, but most of them are in Japanese.)
articles.readMore: You can read more articles on Qiita and Zenn.
